# Bells Fork Auto & Truck

> Used car, truck, and diesel vehicle dealership in Greenville, NC.

## About
Bells Fork Auto & Truck is a pre-owned vehicle dealership located at 3840 Charles Blvd, Greenville, NC 27858. We specialize in quality used cars, trucks, SUVs, and diesel vehicles. Every vehicle undergoes a multi-point mechanical inspection before listing. We serve Greenville, Winterville, Farmville, Ayden, Simpson, Bethel, and the greater Eastern North Carolina region.

## Contact
- Phone: (252) 496-0005
- Text: (252) 917-0551
- Email: bellsforkautoandtruck@gmail.com
- Address: 3840 Charles Blvd, Greenville, NC 27858

## Hours
- Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM
- Sunday: By appointment only

## Inventory
We carry pre-owned vehicles including:
- Trucks: Ford F-150, RAM 1500, RAM 2500, Chevrolet Silverado, Toyota Tacoma, Toyota Tundra, GMC Sierra
- SUVs: Chevrolet Tahoe, GMC Yukon, Jeep Wrangler, Ford Bronco Sport, Toyota RAV4
- Cars: Chevrolet Camaro, Chevrolet Corvette, Dodge Challenger, Subaru WRX
- Diesel: RAM 2500 Cummins, Ford F-250 Power Stroke, Chevrolet Duramax

## Services
- Vehicle sales (pre-owned)
- Financing applications
- Trade-in valuations
- Test drive scheduling
- Vehicle consignment
